positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    creed_brothers != imperium).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    roderick_strong != ivy_nile).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    diamond_mine != imperium).

    roderick_strong != imperium).

    roderick_strong != creed_brothers).

    diamond_mine != creed_brothers).

    diamond_mine != ivy_nile).

    ivy_nile != imperium).

    diamond_mine != roderick_strong).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    creed_brothers != ivy_nile).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define stable(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define member_of(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define leads(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define feud(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
2. stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
5. member_of(ivy_nile,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
7. feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
8. ? [X0] : (stable(X0) & member_of(ivy_nile,X0) & feud(imperium,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~? [X0] : (stable(X0) & member_of(ivy_nile,X0) & feud(imperium,X0)) [negated conjecture 8]
11. ! [X0] : (~stable(X0) | ~member_of(ivy_nile,X0) | ~feud(imperium,X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
22. stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 2]
25. member_of(ivy_nile,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
26. feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 7]
27. ~feud(imperium,X0) | ~member_of(ivy_nile,X0) | ~stable(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
28. ~member_of(ivy_nile,diamond_mine) | ~stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 26,27]
29. ~stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 28,25]
30. $false [forward subsumption resolution 29,22]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
